title: Botania: Garden of Glass
description: A botania addon that adds a skyblock mode
body:
[![](https://violetmoon.org/branding/vm0.png)](https://violetmoon.org)[![](https://violetmoon.org/branding/vm1.png)](https://patreon.com/vazkii)[![](https://violetmoon.org/branding/vm2.png)](https://twitter.com/vazkiimods)[![](https://violetmoon.org/branding/vm3.png)](https://discord.gg/vm)

---

# About

**Garden of Glass** is an addon for [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania "Botania"), adding a new skyblock mode. Garden of Glass implements new skyblock mechanics and a new skyblock world type, as seen above, and ensures everything can be acquirable in a renewable fashion.

The mod jar is effectively just a data pack, and works for both Forge and Fabric/Quilt.
